name: Power Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Frozen apple juice concentrate, thawed
1 cup Raisins soaked for 10 minutes in boiling water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, raisin bran, oatmeal, and baking soda.
2. In a small bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
3. Add the apple juice, yogurt, bananas, and raisins to the flour mixture. Stir to blend.
4. Fold in the beaten egg whites and mix well.
5. Spoon the batter into paper liners or a no-stick muffin pan.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
note: The muffins are very dense and rise very little during baking.
